title: Craftable Knowledge Book
description: Allows you to easily craft the knowledge book!
body:
# Craftable Knowledge Book
Allows you to craft a Knowlege Book with Green Dye + Book. They are special Knowledge Books which can be stacked up to 64 (Usually, they cannot be stacked). ![Knowledge Book Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f2aac664387b1876abb538e0889e5b1a8090036.png) The Knowledge Book has no use on its own other than displaying it in an Item Frame and being interesting to own because it is normally unobtainable but can be useful in other Datapacks. ## 💪 Supported Projects - [World Flags](https://modrinth.com/datapack/world-flags) - [Builders Dream](https://modrinth.com/datapack/builders-dream) - [Biome Powder](https://modrinth.com/datapack/biome-powder) ## 🛠️ Installation ### Datapack Installation Guide Copy the .zip archive into the ".minecraft/saves/__yourworldname__/datapacks" folder, where __yourworldname__ is the name of your world. ### Mod installation Guide Copy the .jar archive into the folder your Mod Loader of choice provides. ## ⚠️ Warnings When you right click with a Knowldge Book, you will lose it. Prior to 1.21 you will lose the whole stack.
